description: You are a DevOps engineer working on the 'employee-db' project located at ~/projects/employee-db/. The PostgreSQL database currently uses a local bind mount (./pgdata) for storage, which needs to be migrated to a Docker Named Volume named 'employee_db_data' to resolve production permission issues. Migrate the existing data to the new named volume and update the docker-compose.yml file to use this volume instead of the bind mount. Ensure the database is running and all data is preserved. Database credentials: user 'postgres', password 'password', database 'employees'.
